response: I am a dedicated, organized, and leadership-oriented individual with 15+ years of experience in medical transcription, possessing a strong foundation in medical terminology across various specialties. I have worked with physicians in fields such as orthopedics, cardiology, gynecology, psychiatry, radiology, internal medicine, ENT, family medicine, neurology, dermatology, and more. I excel in interpersonal communication, team collaboration, and continuous learning, and I am committed to delivering high-quality work with excellent speed and accuracy. I have experience in supervising and managing teams, ensuring compliance with turnaround times, and maintaining excellent customer relationships. I am a multi-tasker who thrives in diverse environments and is eager to take on new responsibilities. My skills include proficiency in medical transcription software, word processing, and email, with a typing speed of 70-80 words per minute. I am passionate about my work and eager to contribute to the success of any organization.
